name: Devil's Food Cake Cockaigne
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Prepare custard: Cook and stir chocolate, milk, brown sugar, and 1 egg yolk in a double boiler until thickened. Keep other ingredients at about 70°F. Sift cake flour before measuring; re-sift with baking soda and salt.
Combine butter and sifting sugar, then beat in egg yolks one at a time. Add flour in three parts, alternating with mixture of water, milk, and vanilla. Stir until smooth after each addition. Incorporate chocolate custard.
Whip egg whites until stiff but not dry. Gently fold into cake batter. Bake in greased pans for about 25 minutes. Cool and spread with caramel icing.
